name: First State Bank
description_short: Loomis, NE's First State Bank branch at 211 Commercial St offers local banking services.
description_long:
First State Bank's Loomis branch at 211 Commercial St serves the local community with in-person banking. This standalone location in Loomis, NE is easily accessible for residents. While specific hours are not published online, you can contact the branch directly to confirm availability.

At this Loomis location, you can access personal and business banking services, including account opening, deposits, withdrawals, and financial consultations. The team at the Loomis, NE branch is ready to help with your banking needs.

For Loomis residents looking for local banking, this First State Bank branch provides convenient access. Remember to bring your ID and relevant documents when visiting. The branch is committed to serving the Loomis community with personalized attention.
services: Surcharge-free ATM access through Allpoint Network (55,000 ATMs)
Branch services at Loomis, Alma, Bertrand, and Axtell locations
pros: FDIC-insured deposits backed by full faith and credit of the U.S. Government
Access to 55,000 surcharge-free ATMs worldwide through Allpoint Network
Four branch locations across Nebraska communities (Loomis, Alma, Bertrand, Axtell)
Specialized agricultural loan services supporting farm customers
Over 70 years of consistent family ownership by the Lauritzen family
Named, accessible bank officers at each branch with NMLS credentials
Continuous digital banking improvements with online and mobile platforms
cons: Limited geographic footprint restricted to rural Nebraska areas only
Small community bank structure may lack competitive rates compared to national banks
Limited product breadth typical of regional banks versus large financial institutions
Website content does not disclose specific checking/savings account features, fees, or rate information
Technology capabilities and digital tools likely lag behind fintech and major banks
best_for: Rural Nebraska farmers and agricultural business owners needing specialized lending
Small-town residents prioritizing personal relationships and local decision-making
Customers seeking traditional community banking with stable, accessible leadership
Individuals valuing multi-generational family-owned bank stewardship
diagnosis: First State Bank is best for rural Nebraska customers and agricultural businesses seeking traditional community banking with personal relationships and local ownership. The main caveat is geographic limitation—the four-branch footprint is restricted to rural Nebraska, making this unsuitable for customers outside these areas or those needing national reach and modern fintech capabilities.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
meta_description: First State Bank at 211 Commercial St, Loomis, NE. Local banking services for the Loomis community.
